prompt: A lone hiker standing on a steep, fog-covered mountain slope at dusk, looking down at their feet on the rocky ground. The fog is thick — visibility is only a few meters in any direction. A trail of muddy footprints zigzags down the hillside behind them, showing an irregular path rather than a straight line. Far below in the valley, barely visible through the mist, a small warm campfire glows orange. The hiker's body language suggests careful, deliberate downward movement. Cinematic photography, golden hour light, photorealistic, no text, no labels, no diagrams, no overlays.
metaphor: The hiker symbolizes optimization navigating a loss landscape; fog reflects uncertainty and local minima; footprints show gradient descent iterations; a distant campfire marks the visible yet hard-to-reach global optimal solution.
